title: references
description: The researcher's curated list of existing documents the PRD should build on. An empty list is valid and means no relevant prior art was found.

path.description: Path (relative to the working dir) of the referenced document. Docs only — not source code.

sections.description: The specific section(s) / heading(s) that matter, e.g. "§3.2 Rate limits" or "Auth model".

rationale.description: One line: why this reference matters for the PRD / what it constrains.
